flags.concern: media-lightbox-persistence: phase 3 overstates what can be deleted from the autosave machinery. The repo still sends other text fields through the same per-keystroke path, and `hasPendingFor()` is also the load-time guard that prevents async loads from overwriting local edits. If the executor removes the edit-version and loader-side pending logic after changing only the main prompt flow, fast edits in the remaining text inputs or edits made before load resolves can still be lost.
flags.evidence: The Img2Img textarea still writes on every keystroke in [Img2ImgControls.tsx](/Users/peteromalley/Documents/reigh-workspace/reigh-app/src/domains/media-lightbox/components/editModes/Img2ImgControls.tsx:69), and the legacy custom LoRA URL input does the same in [EditModePanel.tsx](/Users/peteromalley/Documents/reigh-workspace/reigh-app/src/domains/media-lightbox/components/EditModePanel.tsx:357). Both setters still route into debounced autosave through [useGenerationEditSettings.ts](/Users/peteromalley/Documents/reigh-workspace/reigh-app/src/domains/media-lightbox/hooks/useGenerationEditSettings.ts:219) and [useGenerationEditSettings.ts](/Users/peteromalley/Documents/reigh-workspace/reigh-app/src/domains/media-lightbox/hooks/useGenerationEditSettings.ts:235). Separately, loader coordination calls `hasPendingFor()` before and after async loads in [autoSaveSettingsLoaders.ts](/Users/peteromalley/Documents/reigh-workspace/reigh-app/src/shared/settings/hooks/autoSaveSettingsLoaders.ts:61) and [autoSaveSettingsLoaders.ts](/Users/peteromalley/Documents/reigh-workspace/reigh-app/src/shared/settings/hooks/autoSaveSettingsLoaders.ts:132), so those paths are not prompt-only save-race code.

flags.concern: edit-panel-state-ownership: phase 2 step 7's preferred "wrap `InlineEditView` in a real `ImageEditProvider` and delete `stateOverrides`" is incomplete for this repo. `EditModePanel` does not only consume image-edit form state; it also falls back to `useLightboxCoreSafe()` and `useLightboxVariantsSafe()`. `InlineEditView` lives outside `LightboxStateProvider` and currently relies on `stateOverrides.coreState` to supply a real close handler, so deleting the override layer without adding the matching lightbox providers would regress inline-edit controls back to safe no-op defaults.
flags.evidence: `useEditModePanelState()` reads all three sources in [useEditModePanelState.ts](/Users/peteromalley/Documents/reigh-workspace/reigh-app/src/domains/media-lightbox/hooks/useEditModePanelState.ts:49) through [useEditModePanelState.ts](/Users/peteromalley/Documents/reigh-workspace/reigh-app/src/domains/media-lightbox/hooks/useEditModePanelState.ts:95), including `useLightboxCoreSafe()` and `useLightboxVariantsSafe()`. The override surface explicitly includes `coreState`, `imageEditState`, and `variantsState` in [types.ts](/Users/peteromalley/Documents/reigh-workspace/reigh-app/src/domains/media-lightbox/components/types.ts:33). In inline edit, the canvas is wrapped only with `ImageEditProvider` in [InlineEditView.tsx](/Users/peteromalley/Documents/reigh-workspace/reigh-app/src/tools/edit-images/components/InlineEditView.tsx:92), while the sidebar still passes `stateOverrides={{ coreState: { onClose }, imageEditState: model.imageEditValue }}` in [InlineEditView.tsx](/Users/peteromalley/Documents/reigh-workspace/reigh-app/src/tools/edit-images/components/InlineEditView.tsx:224). Outside a lightbox provider, `useLightboxCoreSafe()` falls back to `onClose: () => {}` in [LightboxStateContext.tsx](/Users/peteromalley/Documents/reigh-workspace/reigh-app/src/domains/media-lightbox/contexts/LightboxStateContext.tsx:126).
